---
title: "CMPSC 9: Python Labs"
format: html
---

In the Winter 2026 quarter I took CMPSC 9: Intermediate Python, where I had weekly coding labs which I treated like my weekly enrichment activity. These were super fun to work through and it really helped me solidify the concepts of object-oriented programming, inheritance, sorting algorithms, etc. that we learned throughout the course.

You can find the instructions to all of my lab assignments [here](https://ucsb-cs9.github.io/w26/).

And you can find all of my lab scripts in my [github repository](https://github.com/hendersonvo/cmpsc9_labs#).

## Personal favorites
I thought these ones were especially fun to do. 

### lab04 : Maze Solver using Stacks

### lab07 : Fresh Tea Shipping System

### lab08 + lab09 : Binary Search Tree (BST) Course Catalog
